name: Lemon Loaf Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease an 8 1/2-by 4 1/2-inch loaf pan and dust lightly with flour. Sift together flour, baking powder, ginger, and salt; set aside.
2. Sprinkle several tablespoons of granulated sugar on a cutting board. Add lemon rind and chop as fine as possible. Transfer to a large mixing bowl and add remaining granulated sugar, butter, and cream cheese. Beat on high speed until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Add yogurt and mix well. Turn off mixer and add dry ingredients. Mix just until combined.
3. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 60 to 70 minutes. Cool in pan for 5 minutes then turn out onto a wire rack.
4. Make glaze by mixing confectioner's sugar and enough lemon juice to make a glaze. Pour over warm cake.
